name: Zoho People
description: Cloud-based HR management. Monitor employee records and organizational data.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Zoho API Console at https://api-console.zoho.com
2. Create a Self Client application
3. Generate a token with scope: ZOHOPEOPLE.forms.ALL
4. Paste the access token below

Note: Tokens expire. For long-term use, set up OAuth2 refresh tokens.

credentialFields.label: OAuth Access Token
credentialFields.helpText: Generate from Zoho API Console (https://api-console.zoho.com). Create a Self Client, generate token with scope: ZOHOPEOPLE.forms.ALL.

checks.name: Zoho People App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Zoho People API is accessible.
